case_title: KATHRYN BENSON ET AL VS. 950 B14 DE LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF AARON LEAVY IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56546795) FILED BY DEFENDANT 950 B14 DE LLC
DECLARATION OF EDWARD C. SINGER, JR. IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANTS SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56546795) FILED BY DEFENDANT 950 B14 DE LLC

PLAINTIFFS SUPPLEMENT BRIEF IN SUPPORT OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANTS MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56774717) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENSON, KATHRYN DISHART, ED

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT 950 B14 DE LLC'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THE PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON, AT A MINIMUM, THE FOLLOWING ELEMENTS OF ITS "MALICIOUS PROSECUTION" CLAIM: (1) THAT NO REASONABLE PERSON IN DEFENDANT'S CIRCUMSTANCES WOULD HAVE BELIEVED THAT THERE WERE REASONABLE GROUNDS TO BRING THE LAWSUIT AGAINST PLAINTIFF, (2) THAT DEFENDANT ACTED PRIMARILY FOR A PURPOSE OTHER THAN SUCCEEDING ON THE MERITS OF THE CLAIM, AND (3) THAT PLAINTIFF WAS HARMED. SEE CACI 1501. PLAINTIFF'S REMAINING CLAIMS ARE BARRED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, REPORTER PEGGY TSUJIMOTO, CSR #5229, (415-828-1919).

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Plaintiffs' Motion For Reconsideration Pursuant To Ccp § 1008
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Plaintiffs' Motion For Reconsideration Pursuant To Ccp § 1008
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Continued To Jun-05-15 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 306

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Cost
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kyle A. Withers, Esq. of Lubin Olson, (415-981-0550), for 950 B14 De LLC, Defendant and moving party.
Yosef Peretz, Esq. (415-732-3777), for Kathryn Benson, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Plaintiff's opposition (courtesy copies) were received right after the tentative ruling was posted. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments rules as follows: DEFENDANT 950 B14 DE LLC's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Cost is transferred to Dept. 306 to be heard by Judge Richard B. Ulmer. Date of the new hearing is to be determined. Moving party is instructed to submit order approved as to form leaving the new date of hearing blank and include that the Court may ask for additional information from the moving party. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Continued To Jun-10-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kyle A. Withers, Esq. of Lubin Olson, (415-981-0550), for 950 B14 De LLC, Defendant and moving party.
Yosef Peretz, Esq. of Peretz & Associates, (415-732-3777), for Kathryn Benson, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Reporter Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229, (415-828-1919).

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT 950 B14 DE LLC's Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff has not shown the probability of prevailing on, at a minimum, the following elements of its "malicious prosecution" claim: (1) that no reasonable person in defendant's circumstances would have believed that there were reasonable grounds to bring the lawsuit against plaintiff, (2) that defendant acted primarily for a purpose other than succeeding on the merits of the claim, and (3) that plaintiff was harmed. See CACI 1501. Plaintiff's remaining claims are barred by the litigation privilege. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Reporter Peggy Tsujimoto, CSR #5229, (415-828-1919), D501.

Defendants Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Continued To Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT 950 B14 DE LLC's Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs' Complaint is Continued to March 9, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Defendants Special Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
